global_summary: This week's plan demands 85 work-days by today across all nine sites; only 29 are earned. Every project missed last week (Jul 6-12), so momentum is thin. Drive painting, trim, and inspections to their Sunday deadlines and log today's site photos.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: 6 of 21 expected work-days done and the week is still savable but slipping (Slip: 71%). Finish PAINTING by Sat Jul 18 and gutters by Thu Jul 16.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Behind plan: 10 of 25 expected work-days done, tiles pushed to Tue Jul 21 (Slip: 23%). Install kitchen plumbing and electrical trim by Sun Jul 19.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: 3 of 14 expected work-days done; savable but slipping (Slip: 79%). Install GLASS and additional PAINT by Wed Jul 15; gutters overdue since Mon Jul 13.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: 11 of 19 expected work-days done; savable but tight (Slip: 24%). Pass pre-pour inspection, pour concrete by Wed Jul 15, start FOUNDATION CURE by Thu Jul 16.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Behind plan: 16 of 32 expected work-days done, plumbing trim slipped to Mon Jul 20 (Slip: 33%). Install backsplash tiles by Thu Jul 16 to catch up.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Slip: 25% of the month plan (31.0 of 44.0 expected work-days done; 5/20 tasks). Key move: ELECTRICAL: INSTALL ELECTRICAL TRIM (Sat Jul 11 → Mon Jul 20, +9d).

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: 67 of 86 expected work-days done; savable but slipping (Slip: 19%). Pass framing/MEP inspection by Wed Jul 15, roof by Thu Jul 16, start SIDING by Fri Jul 17.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Slip: 21% of the month plan (18.0 of 31.0 expected work-days done; 3/25 tasks). Key move: ROOFING: INSTALL SHINGLES (Fri Jul 17 → Thu Jul 30, +13d).

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: On pace this week with 13 of 15 expected work-days done (Slip: 5%). Finish drywall tape/texture by Fri Jul 17, then start interior paint primer by Sat Jul 18.
